# AROM STUDIO

> AROM STUDIO is a premium Web Design & Development Agency founded by Arnav Pagare.

## Core Documentation & Pages
- [Official Website](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/)
- [Services & Solutions](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services)
- [Pricing & Packages](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/pricing)
- [About AROM Studio & Founder](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/about)
- [Contact & Project Inquiries](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/contact)
- [FAQ & Knowledge Base](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/faq)
- [Client Portal & Onboarding](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/portal)
- [Discovery Questionnaire](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/discovery-questionnaire)
- [Brand Identity Guidelines](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/brand)

## Services & Tech Stack
- **Web Application Development**: Custom Next.js, React 19, TypeScript, Node.js applications.
- **UI/UX & Web Design**: Modern dark mode, glassmorphism, responsive agency layouts.
- **E-Commerce & SaaS**: High-converting online stores, custom web apps, and SaaS platforms.
- **Performance & SEO**: 100/100 Lighthouse optimization, structured JSON-LD data, fast loading speeds.
